feedback.details: Diagram validates successfully with mmdc (exit code 0). No deprecated C4 syntax (e.g., ']') detected. c1-context.md:5-35

overall_summary: The architecture delivers strong compliance across most criteria. All 8 required components are present (c1-context.md:8-21), technology versions are precisely specified (Golang 1.21+, Docker 24.0+, etc. at lines 10,12,13,22), and security boundaries are correctly delineated with dashed 'Trusted Zone (mTLS Required)' around Consul/Vault (line 11) and solid 'Public Internet (TLS 1.3 Termination)' around frontier API (line 17). All 11 relationship labels meet the ≥25 character requirement and include latency bounds (lines 23-33). The narrative (line 3) explicitly references all required cluster elements: /metrics endpoint, Grafana dashboard ID 'llm-switch-overview', 'memory-priority' strategy from Section 3.1, and Kubernetes Node Affinity constraints. Two gaps exist: (1) PRD Traceability Matrix (lines 37-51) maps components to sections but does not explicitly enumerate and link User Journey *steps* from PRD Sections 4.2.1-4.2.3 to specific diagram elements as required; (2) Model Routing Edge Cases use Rel_Back for fallbacks (lines 32-33) which creates backward arrows but not visually *dashed* lines as the criterion requires—dashed styling requires explicit CSS or style definitions not present in the diagram.
